name: Hindolavasantham
notes: Upanga janya of Natabhairavi (mela 20); rishabha varjya in arohana; arohana: S G₂ M₁ P D₁ N₂ D₁ Ṡ (vakra, R omitted), avarohana: Ṡ N₂ D₁ M₁ G₂ S; suddha dhaivata (D1) only—historically documented under Bhairavi/Natabhairavi mela since Govinda Dikshitar's Sangita Sudha; eka-raga known for Tyagaraja's Ra Ra Sita Ramani Manohara (adi), Muthuswami Dikshitar's Santana Ramasvaminam (adi), and Ramasvami Dikshitar's cauka varna Valaci Vacci
